faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Garden City South?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Garden City South typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as treatments target adult fleas, larvae, and eggs through their complete life cycle. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application or until surfaces are completely dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during your service.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation helps maximize treatment effectiveness. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and upholstery, washing pet bedding in hot water, removing pet food and water bowls, and ensuring pets are treated by a veterinarian. Our team will provide a complete preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment.
